steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student wants to specify how many chromosomes the pineapple has—state the exact number directly.

steps.title: Apply the goal to the choices
steps.content: Choice B directly states the pineapple has fifty chromosomes, specifying the exact number from the notes. Choice A explains what chromosomes do (not a count), Choice C makes a comparison instead of stating an exact number, and Choice D specifies the melon's count instead. This matches choice B — B is correct.
